faqs.question: What types of cockroaches are common in Union, NJ?
faqs.answer: Union properties most commonly experience German cockroaches in kitchens and bathrooms, American cockroaches in basements and sewers, and Oriental cockroaches in damp areas. Our technicians are experienced in identifying and treating all cockroach species found in New Jersey homes and businesses.
